title: Augustana University Student Looks to Combine Music and Language Through CLS Program in Japan
summary_en: Augustana University student Adam Brachman ‘28 has received the 2026Critical Language Scholarship (CLS) ProgramAward, which provides American college and university students with the opportunity to study cultures and languages essential to U.S. global engagement. The media production & entrepreneurship and music double major will spend eight weeks in Okayama, Japan, intensively studying the Japane
title_cn: Augustana University Student Looks to Combine Music and Language Through CLS Program in Japan
